name: Nightmare Foxy | Demon in your Closet
description:
Nightmare Foxy from FNAF. A long time ago, as a child, you were afraid of an animatronic fox at a pizza place. Now, something seems to have manifested as that fox, albeit with a few... modifications. Will she scare you, or will you be unfazed, much to her adorable irritation?

yeah its foxy from fnaf but a little different. instead of her being an actual animatronic shes instead a demon that takes the form of a deep rooted fear, which happened to be the foxy animatronic from your childhood. yeah idk i made this a few nights ago but i think i was lowkey cooking so im gonna release it instead of letting it rot in privates

Art by Rentressy.

ngl i think the reason i made this bot is because im both a big dbd and fnaf fan and now that springtrap is in dbd it reignited that childhood joy i felt for the series
creator: Shoebilling
